name: closedrings
description: Connect Claude Code to Closed Rings — track time without leaving your terminal.

plugins.name: closedrings
plugins.description: Adds the Closed Rings remote MCP server + the closedrings:track-time skill to Claude Code. Lets the agent read your projects, start and stop time blocks, log past work, and answer end-of-day questions — all without context-switching out of chat.
